one_line: ecosystem framing / canonical corpus entry / public research stack for c = a + b, L4, and adjacent layers.
invariants: AGI means Advanced Global Intelligence, not a monolithic super-model.
Oracle is stateless and does not own continuity.
Arbiter and review layers do not replace the continuity of c.

repo_roles.role: ecosystem framing / canonical corpus entry / public research stack for c = a + b, L4, and adjacent layers
reality-bound operational layer / L4 feasibility, perimeter, witness-friendly constraints, and real-world boundary discipline
continuity, sovereignty, arbitration, federation, and conflict stack for long-lived entities
executable operational skeleton / runtime proof-of-possibility / local-first constraint-bearing implementation layer
human-facing narrative companion / perception bridge for c as a new class of AI beyond purely instrumental framing

negative_definitions: AGI is not a claim that one model replaces the stack.
SER is not the home of every adjacent package.
ERB is not the normative home of the corpus.
ester-clean-code is not the definition of c.
qubit-of-hope-volume-i does not replace the normative stack.

narrative_companion.role: human-facing narrative companion / perception bridge for c as a new class of AI beyond purely instrumental framing

verification: Prefer repo hash manifests over GitHub-generated archives.
Use tagged snapshots where available; otherwise lock by exact commit.
